title: A derived doctrine gate that bites
action: Per D22. Author scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs (auto-discovered under the scripts/ root, run_verify.mjs:40-45). It must DERIVE every ground truth, never compare two hand-authored lists: (1) build the file set by glob — every **/AGENTS.block.md PLUS the merged root AGENTS.md, which a glob on AGENTS.block.md does NOT match and which is the file every session actually loads; assert none contains the retired sentence. (2) Derive the Codex lifecycle-event count from Object.keys(json.hooks).length of .codex/hooks.json — NOT Object.keys(json), which yields ['hooks'] with length 1 — and assert every live prose claim of that count agrees. (3) Derive the hook-script count from a glob of hooks/bee-*.mjs and assert no live prose claims a different one. (4) Include a --selftest row, following the idiom at scripts/release_manifest.mjs:239-292 and scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs:113-129, that PROVES the comparison bites: feed it a fixture carrying a re-introduced sentence and a fixture whose prose count disagrees with the derived count, and assert the checker reports both. A gate that has never been seen failing has not been shown to work.

truths: The gate fails when the retired sentence is re-introduced into the merged root AGENTS.md specifically — not only into a projection.
The gate fails when a prose count disagrees with its derived quantity.
Both failure modes are demonstrated by the selftest, with its output recorded — not asserted.
No file path and no expected count is hand-written as a literal in the test.
artifacts: scripts/test_doctrine_parity.mjs with a --selftest that exhibits both bites
prohibitions: Never hand-maintain the projection path list or the expected counts — derive both.
Never let the glob stand in for the root AGENTS.md; it does not match it.

trace.dropped_reason: Revision 2 failed validation (6 CRITICAL). Superseded by revision 3 under D23-D26: widened regen trigger, PreCompact row split, four-way count vocabulary, corrected handoffOutcome premise.
